## Summary

Describe the documentation content and why it changed.

## Content and boundaries

- [ ] Current behavior is documented accurately.
- [ ] Implemented-but-unverified behavior is labelled.
- [ ] Planned functionality is not presented as available.
- [ ] Financial, audit, and privileged-action boundaries are retained.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Sidebar and internal links checked
- [ ] Local search checked
- [ ] Mobile and light/dark mode checked
- [ ] Media/privacy review completed

## Reviewers

- Business documentation owner:
- Technical verifier:

## Deployment

- [ ] No GitHub Pages/DNS/custom-domain changes are included.
